items.title: Ambedkar Jayanti 2026: What will be closed on April 14? Here’s everything you need to know
items.summary: Ambedkar Jayanti 2026: Ambedkar Jayanti, also called Bhim Jayanti, is celebrated every year on April 14 to honor Dr. B.R. Despite this, Lilly remains optimistic about the distinct advantages Mounjaro brings to its users.
